workloads.name: async pipeline diagnostics contract
workloads.description: Async diagnostics benchmark covering async render pipeline creation, error scopes, and shader compilation info.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples contract: command shape, Dawn filter mapping, and timing normalization are explicitly aligned for strict comparability.

timingNormalization.note: Apples-to-apples only: Fawn repeats async diagnostics command 50 times and normalizes to per-iteration units for trend tracking.

reasons: left timed sample count 1 is below claim floor 15
right timed sample count 1 is below claim floor 15

p95Percent=-941.834303 is not positive (positive means left faster)
p99Percent=-941.834303 is not positive (positive means left faster)
